assertions.description: RP2350B U3 thermal pad shows 8 vias (good adequacy). MICRO_SD1 mechanical pad correctly flagged as having 0-1 vias (none/insufficient). 85 footprints matches gerber count. USB-C1 negative edge clearance (-1.0mm) is a false positive — this is an edge-mount USB-C connector intentionally overlapping the board edge.
assertions.aspirational_reason: auto-generated check path incorrect for PCB/gerber output
